steps.title: Recognize what 'format' refers to
steps.content: The prompt asks to describe the FORMAT of the poem — its structural composition, not publication details, themes, or the author's reasoning.

steps.title: Identify the structural description
steps.content:
The poem "5 haiku (for Sarah Vaughan)" is written as a sequence of five haiku. directly describes the poem's structure: a sequence of five haiku.
  • A overgeneralizes to all poems in the book and omits the specific count
  • C discusses publication and theme rather than structure
  • D explains the author's motivation rather than the actual format


This matches the correct answer — B is correct.
